reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Baños muy limpios. Funciona todo. La cafetería excelente, con vistas al ex camping en estado de abandono por cuestiones legales ,  con gran arboleda e instalaciones para la recreación y el descanso . Un verdadero pulmón y reserva urbana que, lamentablemente, está fuera de uso.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Very clean restrooms. Everything works. The café is excellent, overlooking the former campsite, now abandoned due to legal issues, with its large grove of trees and facilities for recreation and relaxation. A true green space and urban reserve that, sadly, is no longer in use.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHXzhQUktREAE
